title: Improve parsing of package scoped identifiers

features.name: package_scope_with_name_collision
features.description: Code should include a package-scoped identifier access using :: where the package contains an item that shadows a type in the current scope

features.name: package_scope_with_expression_ambiguity
features.description: Code should include a $bits() expression with a package-scoped identifier where both type and signal identifiers are possible in the expression context
